name: TransAlta Corporation
description: TransAlta Corporation is a prominent Canadian electricity power generator and wholesale marketing company headquartered in Calgary, Alberta. With over 100 years of experience, the company operates a diverse portfolio of energy assets, including wind, hydro, solar, and natural gas power plants across Canada, the United States, and Western Australia. As one of Canada’s largest publicly traded power generators, TransAlta is committed to a responsible energy transition, focusing on delivering reliable, sustainable electricity while evolving essential energy infrastructure to support communities and economies globally.
